source_quote_or_anchor: Risk: Ureteral perforation | Mitigation: Pre-operative imaging + gentle technique
Risk: Inadequate hemostasis | Mitigation: Backup hemostasis method available
Risk: Skin irritation | Mitigation: Rotation of sensor site
Risk: Sensor dislodgement | Mitigation: Adhesive patch reinforcement
Risk: Device failure during shock | Mitigation: Battery monitoring + maintenance
Risk: Valve migration | Mitigation: Appropriate sizing + imaging
Risk: Access site complication | Mitigation: Ultrasound guidance
Risk: Restenosis | Mitigation: Antiplatelet therapy + follow-up
